nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 智利
nodes.summary: 智利是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联200种鸟类，包括北山䳍、南山䳍、凤头䳍等200种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 巴塔哥尼亞
nodes.summary: 巴塔哥尼亞是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括小美洲鸵、Silvery grebe、阿根廷鸊鷉等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 國家公園
nodes.summary: 國家公園是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括南美黑鹂，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 谷地
nodes.summary: 谷地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Crested cuckoo-dove、Black-headed tody-flycatcher、黑菲比霸鶲等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 南美黑鹂
nodes.summary: 南美黑鹂（Austral blackbird，学名 Curaeus curaeus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 阿根廷
nodes.summary: 阿根廷是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联495种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、北山䳍、南山䳍等495种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Argentina and Chile, and it migrates to regions close by

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Argentina and Chile, and it migrates to regions close by

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Their main habitats are woodlands, forests, lakeshores, beaches, fields, valley bottoms, and rocky shores. It is commonly found in small flocks of 6 to 20 in and around the forest, and never in the open land. Can be commonly found in protected areas in national parks around Chile and Argentina. They are found in protected areas where the conditions support proper living and breeding

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Its population size and trend have remained stable, and the bird is not endangered as they are considered Least Concern with no current threats to their species. Its migration patterns are largely resident and they migrate to west-central Argentina, and on the Atlantic coast of Patagonia. Their exact population size is unknown but is around under 10,000
